/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Wno-comment -stdlib=libc++ -D_LIBCPP_VERSION -O3 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -stdlib=libc++ -Wl,-exported_symbols_list,"/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/3rdparty/MeshFEM/tbb/tbbmalloc.def" -o libtbbmalloc.dylib -install_name @rpath/libtbbmalloc.dylib CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbbmalloc/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbbmalloc/large_objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbbmalloc/backref.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbbmalloc/tbbmalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbbmalloc/frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/src/tbb/itt_notify.cpp.o
